opportunity_title: Volunteer with Housing Works Thrift Shops!
description_short: For over 25 years Housing Works has been providing lifesaving services to New Yorkers living with and affected by HIV/AIDS and homelessness. To help fund these efforts, Housing Works operates a…
description_long: For over 25 years Housing Works has been providing lifesaving services to New Yorkers living with and affected by HIV/AIDS and homelessness. To help fund these efforts, Housing Works operates a variety of entrepreneurial businesses, including ten Thrift Shops (7 in Manhattan, 2 in Brooklyn) and our SoHo Bookstore Café, and holds several major fundraising events. Volunteers are pivotal to the Housing Works mission of providing lifesaving services to New Yorkers living with and affected by HIV/AIDS and homelessness. Ready to jump in? Fill out the form below! We will reach you within 48 hours with your next steps. Housing Works Volunteer Interest Form: https://housingworks.tfaforms.net/358660 Volunteers can offer valuable support in many different areas: 1. Weekly: Thrift Shops & Bookstore (1 shift per week) Contribute 3-4 hours once a week and join a community of thousands supporting our mission. • Bookstore: High need for volunteers. Enjoy a mix of literature and fashion? You can offer much-needed support to the Housing Works Bookstore and assist with our large selection of literature and thrifted clothing! • Thrift Shops: Join your local Housing Works thrift shop and play an important part in the fight against HIV/AIDS & Homelessness. • Volunteers receive a 25% discount (extends to all shops after 90 days). 2. Monthly: Special Events & Projects (1 shift per month) Contribute 3–4 hours once a month at our fundraising events. Your presence is vital for creating great experiences for our community. • Attend vibrant sales events with food & music! 100% of the proceeds go back into Housing Works lifesaving services. • Volunteers receive a 25% discount at the event location. (Note: You must be 18+ to volunteer for Housing Works, must live in the U.S.) Please contact volunteer@housingworks.org with any questions. We sincerely thank you for your time and support! You are signing up to receive communication via email about volunteer opportunities and can unsubscribe at any time. Share this volunteer opportunity!

opportunity_title: Volunteers Have A Ball!!  Refresh NTX Gala 2026
description_short: Refresh NTX is changing lives by providing free hygiene products to 2,500 children across 11 North Texas communities. For children living in poverty, something as simple as a toothbrush, deodorant,…
description_long: Refresh NTX is changing lives by providing free hygiene products to 2,500 children across 11 North Texas communities. For children living in poverty, something as simple as a toothbrush, deodorant, or shampoo can mean the difference between confidence and humiliation. Hygiene insecurity often leads to bullying, missed school, and lasting emotional challenges—but together, we can change that. This year's gala promises to be our biggest and most exciting yet—and we're almost sold out! Guests will enjoy an elegant evening of dinner, casino games, live entertainment, and an inspiring keynote conversation featuring three-time Super Bowl Champion and Dallas Cowboys legend Darren Woodson, interviewed by Texas Radio Hall of Fame broadcaster Norm Hitzges. Darren's remarkable story of overcoming childhood poverty perfectly reflects the hope and resilience at the heart of Refresh NTX. Because Refresh NTX is powered entirely by volunteers, every helping hand makes a real difference. With no paid staff, approximately 95% of gala proceeds go directly toward providing hygiene products for children who need them most. Whether you love decorating, greeting guests, serving dinner, helping with the wine or whiskey pull, assisting at the Butt Sketch station, or working behind the scenes, there's a volunteer role for you. Please Note: After ball volunteers may stay til 1:00 AM to assist with take down-THANK YOU! You'll meet incredible people, be part of an unforgettable evening, and know your time is creating brighter futures for thousands of local children.  Free Parking is Available. Watch the 30-second video below to hear Darren Woodson share why he believes in Refresh NTX. https://youtube.com/shorts/tEZ73WDVboQ?si=DCYO_DA12TSlxcrv Most importantly, join us in making sure we never have to say "no" to a child who needs our help. We'd love to have you on our team! Share this volunteer opportunity!

opportunity_title: Volunteers Needed for Arlington Recycling & Sustainability Initiative
description_short: Dear Volunteer Coordinator, My name is Megan York, and I am reaching out to invite your organization to participate in a community sustainability initiative taking place at 912 Six Flags Drive in…
description_long: Dear Volunteer Coordinator, My name is Megan York, and I am reaching out to invite your organization to participate in a community sustainability initiative taking place at 912 Six Flags Drive in Arlington, Texas, from June 11 through July 14. As part of this project, free bottled water will be provided to visitors using the parking facility. To support our environmental goals and create a near zero-waste, low-carbon-footprint operation, we are seeking volunteers to assist with collecting and recycling empty water bottles throughout the event period. Volunteer responsibilities include: • Collecting empty water bottles from designated recycling stations • Encouraging proper recycling and waste disposal • Helping maintain a clean and environmentally responsible event space • Assisting with transporting collected recyclables to recycling containers • Serving as ambassadors for sustainability and community engagement Benefits for volunteers include: • Community service hours • Environmental stewardship experience • Team-building opportunities • Participation in a meaningful community initiative • Supporting sustainability efforts in Arlington We are seeking both individual volunteers and volunteer groups. Flexible shifts will be available throughout the project period. If your organization may be interested in participating, please reply with the following information: • Full Name of Volunteer Coordinator or Primary Contact • Organization Name • Phone Number • Email Address • Estimated Number of Volunteers Available • Preferred Dates and Times • Any special requirements or considerations for your volunteer team We would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss how your organization can be involved in helping us create a successful recycling and sustainability program. Thank you for your consideration and for the work your organization does to support our community. We look forward to hearing from you. Sincerely, Megan York Fútbol for the Culture Organizing Director 817-932-5152 megan.ann.york@gmail.com Share this volunteer opportunity!

opportunity_title: Your Time Matters More Than You’ll Know
description_short: An hour a week. That’s all it takes to bring comfort, connection, and companionship to someone who doesn’t often get to see friends or family. At Choice Hospice, our volunteers sit with patients,…
description_long: An hour a week. That’s all it takes to bring comfort, connection, and companionship to someone who doesn’t often get to see friends or family. At Choice Hospice, our volunteers sit with patients, listen to stories, share quiet moments, and remind people that they are not alone. You don’t need medical experience — just a compassionate heart and a willingness to give your time. Why Your Hour Matters • Many of our patients spend long stretches without visitors. • A friendly voice or a warm presence can brighten their entire week. • You’ll offer dignity, companionship, and human connection during one of life’s most tender seasons. What You’ll Do • Visit patients in their homes or care facilities • Offer conversation, reading, music, or simply a peaceful presence • Support families by being part of a compassionate care team What You’ll Gain • A deeper sense of purpose • Meaningful relationships • The knowledge that your kindness made a real difference If you’ve ever felt called to serve, to comfort, or to simply be there for someone who needs it — we would love to welcome you. Give an hour. Change a life. Become a Choice Hospice Volunteer. Deborah Booth Share this volunteer opportunity!
